root_text.sn46.2:1.2: “Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ayaṁ kāyo āhāraṭṭhitiko, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhati, anāhāro no tiṭṭhati;
root_text.sn46.2:1.3: evameva kho, bhikkhave, pañca nīvaraṇā āhāraṭṭhitikā, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhanti, anāhārā no tiṭṭhanti.
root_text.sn46.2:2.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā kāmacchandassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā kāmacchandassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.2:2.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā kāmacchandassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā kāmacchandassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.2:3.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā byāpādassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā byāpādassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.2:3.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā byāpādassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā byāpādassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.2:4.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā thinamiddhassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā thinamiddhassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.2:4.2: Atthi, bhikkhave, arati tandi vijambhitā bhattasammado cetaso ca līnattaṁ.
root_text.sn46.2:4.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā thinamiddhassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā thinamiddhassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.2:5.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.2:5.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā uddhaccakukkuccassa bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.2:6.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannāya vā vicikicchāya uppādāya, uppannāya vā vicikicchāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya?
root_text.sn46.2:6.4: ayamāhāro anuppannāya vā vicikicchāya uppādāya, uppannāya vā vicikicchāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya.
root_text.sn46.2:7.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ayaṁ kāyo āhāraṭṭhitiko, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhati, anāhāro no tiṭṭhati;
root_text.sn46.2:7.2: evameva kho, bhikkhave, ime pañca nīvaraṇā āhāraṭṭhitikā, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhanti, anāhārā no tiṭṭhanti.
root_text.sn46.2:8.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ayaṁ kāyo āhāraṭṭhitiko, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhati, anāhāro no tiṭṭhati;
root_text.sn46.2:8.2: evameva kho, bhikkhave, satta bojjhaṅgā āhāraṭṭhitikā, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhanti, anāhārā no tiṭṭhanti.
root_text.sn46.2:9.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.2:9.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā satisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.2:10.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.2:10.2: Atthi, bhikkhave, kusalākusalā dhammā, sāvajjānavajjā dhammā, hīnapaṇītā dhammā, kaṇhasukkasappaṭibhāgā dhammā.
root_text.sn46.2:10.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.2:11.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.2:11.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā vīriyasambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.2:12.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.2:12.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā pītisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.2:13.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.2:13.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā passaddhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.2:14.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.2:14.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā samādhisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.2:15.1: Ko ca, bhikkhave, āhāro anuppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā?
root_text.sn46.2:15.4: ayamāhāro anuppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa uppādāya, uppannassa vā upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūriyā.
root_text.sn46.2:16.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ayaṁ kāyo āhāraṭṭhitiko, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhati, anāhāro no tiṭṭhati;
root_text.sn46.2:16.2: evameva kho, bhikkhave, ime satta bojjhaṅgā āhāraṭṭhitikā, āhāraṁ paṭicca tiṭṭhanti, anāhārā no tiṭṭhantī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.2:1.2: “Mendicants, this body is sustained by food. It depends on food to continue, and without food it doesn’t continue.
translation_text.sn46.2:1.3: In the same way, the five hindrances are sustained by fuel. They depend on fuel to continue, and without fuel they don’t continue.
translation_text.sn46.2:2.1: And what fuels the arising of sensual desire, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.2:2.2: There is the feature of beauty.
translation_text.sn46.2:2.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.2:2.4: fuels the arising of sensual desire, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.2:3.1: And what fuels the arising of ill will, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.2:3.2: There is the feature of harshness.
translation_text.sn46.2:3.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.2:3.4: fuels the arising of ill will, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.2:4.1: And what fuels the arising of dullness and drowsiness, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.2:4.2: There is discontent, sloth, yawning, sleepiness after eating, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.sn46.2:4.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:4.4: fuels the arising of dullness and drowsiness, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.2:5.1: And what fuels the arising of restlessness and remorse, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.2:5.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.2:5.4: fuels the arising of restlessness and remorse, or, when they have arisen, makes them increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.2:6.1: And what fuels the arising of doubt, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow?
translation_text.sn46.2:6.2: There are things that are grounds for doubt.
translation_text.sn46.2:6.3: Frequent irrational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:6.4: fuels the arising of doubt, or, when it has arisen, makes it increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.2:7.1: This body is sustained by food. It depends on food to continue, and without food it doesn’t continue.
translation_text.sn46.2:7.2: In the same way, the five hindrances are sustained by fuel. They depend on fuel to continue, and without fuel they don’t continue.
translation_text.sn46.2:8.1: This body is sustained by food. It depends on food to continue, and without food it doesn’t continue.
translation_text.sn46.2:8.2: In the same way, the seven awakening factors are sustained by fuel. They depend on fuel to continue, and without fuel they don’t continue.
translation_text.sn46.2:9.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of mindfulness, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.2:9.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of mindfulness.
translation_text.sn46.2:9.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:9.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of mindfulness, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.2:10.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of investigation of principles, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.2:10.2: There are qualities that are skillful and unskillful, blameworthy and blameless, inferior and superior, and those on the side of dark and bright.
translation_text.sn46.2:10.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:10.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of investigation of principles, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.2:11.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of energy, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.2:11.2: There are the elements of initiative, persistence, and exertion.
translation_text.sn46.2:11.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:11.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of energy, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.2:12.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of rapture, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.2:12.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of rapture.
translation_text.sn46.2:12.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:12.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of rapture, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.2:13.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of tranquility, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.2:13.2: There is tranquility of the body and of the mind.
translation_text.sn46.2:13.3: Frequent rational application of mind to that
translation_text.sn46.2:13.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of tranquility, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.2:14.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of immersion, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.2:14.2: There are things that are the basis of serenity and freedom from distraction.
translation_text.sn46.2:14.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:14.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of immersion, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.2:15.1: And what fuels the arising of the awakening factor of equanimity, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it?
translation_text.sn46.2:15.2: There are things that are grounds for the awakening factor of equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.2:15.3: Frequent rational application of mind to them
translation_text.sn46.2:15.4: fuels the arising of the awakening factor of equanimity, or, when it has arisen, fully develops it.
translation_text.sn46.2:16.1: This body is sustained by food. It depends on food to continue, and without food it doesn’t continue.
translation_text.sn46.2:16.2: In the same way, the seven awakening factors are sustained by fuel. They depend on fuel to continue, and without fuel they don’t continue.”
